response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, and promotional material for 'hololive 5th Generation' was identified, followed by a performance of the song 'Hyper Jumpin''. I identified the performers as the hololive 5th Generation members and the song title from on-screen text. I then searched for the lyrics of the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by 'hololive 5th Generation' using the query: '\"Hyper Jumpin'\" hololive 5th Generation Japanese and English lyrics'. Found the original Japanese lyrics and translated them accordingly for the JSON output. The performance segments occur twice in the video loop.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the 'hololive 5th Generation' live concert 'Re:VISION', featuring information on ticket/goods purchasing, followed by two instances of a performance of the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by the hololive 5th Generation members (Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Shishiro Botan, and Yukihana Lamy).

scenes.description: Promotional slides for the hololive 5th Generation live event 'Re:VISION', showing ticket and merchandise purchase methods.
The song 'Hyper Jumpin'' is performed by hololive 5th Generation members (Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Shishiro Botan, and Yukihana Lamy).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin' now

Hyper jumpin', 飛び出そう
Come on baby 輝いて
ハートきゅんって pump it up
Hyper jumpin', 夢の先まで
もっと もっと 刺激が欲しいの

Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin'

子どもくらい はしゃぐ方がお徳でしょ
低気圧から這い上がっていくテンション
酔いながら打ち返しまくるメンション
カートを乗りこなして進むミッション

このままスピード加速して
たどり着く先に 何があるんだろう
止まらない気持ちは助走つけて
次元を超えて行こう (さぁ)

Hyper jumpin', 飛び跳ねよう
ハイになって灰になるまで
ダンシング Shake it up
Hyper jumpin', 空の向こうまで
もっと もっと 近づきたいの
(Woh...)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hyper jumpin' now, Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin', let's jump out
Come on baby, shine
Heart goes kyun, pump it up
Hyper jumpin', to the end of the dream
I want more, more stimulation
Hyper jumpin' now, Hyper jumpin'
It's better to act like a child, isn't it?
Tension rising from low pressure
Returning mentions while drunk
Mission to ride and master the cart
Speed up like this
What's at the place we reach?
Let's add a run-up to this unstoppable feeling
Let's cross the dimensions (Now)
Hyper jumpin', let's jump
Dancing until I become ash, becoming high
Shake it up, Hyper jumpin'
I want to get closer, more and more
To beyond the sky
(Woh...)

scenes.description: Transition to text overlay and then back to promotional material.
The song 'Hyper Jumpin'' is performed again by hololive 5th Generation members.
